entries.question: 今回、変更してはいけない制約や既存要素はありますか
entries.answer: 認証基盤は変更しない

entries.question: council approval で何が決まったか
entries.answer: prototype council execution prepared 1 seat calls in single-instance-role-switching: Guardian with 1 completed model calls; approval status: approved

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: The proof is deterministic and local; broader backend-family evidence is still a release follow-up.
entries.expectation_state: One end-to-end runtime proof loop completed and should now be tightened into a release-grade major version gate.
entries.mismatch_state: The proof is deterministic and local; broader backend-family evidence is still a release follow-up.
entries.scale_direction: Expand the same auditable loop shape across additional backend families without changing the contract layer.

entries.question: framework self-audit で次に残る gap は何か
entries.answer: benchmark definitions and partial enforcement exist, but reusable benchmark artifact sets and recorded pass/fail evaluation runs are still missing.
entries.expectation_state: v3.x baseline runtime is green, but the newly added review-validity and orchestrator runtime-discipline benchmarks are not yet operationalized to release-grade pass evidence.
entries.mismatch_state: benchmark definitions and partial enforcement exist, but reusable benchmark artifact sets and recorded pass/fail evaluation runs are still missing.
entries.scale_direction: finish TASK-029 and TASK-030 through runnable benchmark artifact sets and recorded self-hosting verdict evidence before cutting a new version
